message:
feat(scheduler): add try_local_any_lane for single-lock multi-lane local dispatch

Add ThreeLaneWorker::try_local_any_lane() that acquires the local
PriorityScheduler lock once and checks cancel, timed (deadline-aware),
and ready lanes in priority order via pop_any_lane_with_hint.

This replaces the pattern of 3 separate lock acquisitions when
try_cancel_work, try_timed_work, and try_ready_work each fall through
to the local scheduler independently. The method reads the current
time from the timer driver handle and passes it to the deadline-aware
pop method to prevent premature dispatch of future timers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
